CustomField.description: Direct Lookup to the IndividualApplication (NEPA process) this document belongs to. Set on upload or by the NEPA_AdminRecord_AutoCreate flow. Provides a stable, queryable parent reference that survives ContentDocumentLink traversal limitations in OmniScript Integration Procedures (Phase 2). Enables SOQL FROM ContentVersion WHERE nepa_process__c = :processId without going through ContentDocumentLink.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The NEPA permitting process this document belongs to.
CustomField.label: NEPA Process
